overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Temple of Dionysos. The player character walks around a colossal golden statue, ascends stone stairs, and explores a sunlit terrace before interacting with a historical banner to uncover a discovery site.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with colossal golden statue

events.description: begins circling around the right side of the golden statue to approach the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking around the base of the colossal statue, observing it from different angles while approaching the staircase

entered.detail: massive bronze-colored statue of Dionysos holding a thyrsus staff, adorned with flower garlands at base
ancient Greek temple with dark stone columns and purple banners hanging from facade
golden ceremonial bowl with flames atop a stone pedestal
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
red and purple flower arrangements draped around the statue base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit temple courtyard dominated by a colossal golden statue of Dionysos. The camera circles the statue from right to left, revealing the stone temple building with purple banners on the right and a wide staircase leading upward. The area is sparsely populated with a few standing NPCs in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to temple terrace

events.description: transitions from open courtyard to ascending the enclosed stone staircase
reaches top of stairs and emerges onto the open temple terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by mossy walls, approaching the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in red toga descending the stairs toward the courtyard

entered.detail: large wooden latticed gate at the top of the stairs marking the temple entrance
moss-covered stone walls flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide stone staircase leading up to the temple, leaving the golden statue behind. The stairs are flanked by mossy stone walls and the temple building looms closer on the right. A woman in red robes descends the stairs in the opposite direction. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens onto a sunlit terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated temple terrace with ocean overlook

events.description: interacts with the Naxos Banner to uncover the discovery site

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit terrace past groups of robed NPCs, approaching the purple banner for interaction

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures walking along the terrace pathway in the same direction
man in white toga standing near the terrace railing overlooking the ocean

entered.detail: large purple banner with silver kylix drinking cup emblem hanging from temple facade
large leafy green bushes with pink flowers growing along the terrace
decorative stone balustrade along the terrace edge overlooking the sea
distant blue sea and horizon visible beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character explores the elevated temple terrace with views of the distant ocean. Several robed NPCs walk along the stone pathway or stand near the railing. The camera approaches a purple Naxos Banner hanging from the temple wall and interacts with it, triggering a discovery notification. Lush bushes and flowering plants decorate the terrace floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand temple courtyard up to an elevated terrace overlooking the sea. It begins by circling a colossal golden statue of Dionysos from right to left, revealing purple banners and a wide stone staircase. As the character ascends these stairs, the golden statue recedes and the temple building looms closer, passing a woman in red robes before the view opens onto a sunlit terrace. The scene then expands across the elevated stone pathway, where robed NPCs wander amidst lush bushes and flowering plants. Finally, the camera approaches a purple Naxos Banner hanging from the wall and interacts with it, triggering a discovery notification against the backdrop of the distant ocean.
